name: logistics managers in small e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For logistics managers in small e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of delivery records and invoices.
target_audience: logistics managers in small e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: discrepancies between delivery records and invoiced shipments
features: manual entry option for delivery records

locked_fields.primary_user: logistics managers in small e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: discrepancies between delivery records and invoiced shipments
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For logistics managers in small e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of delivery records and invoices.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of delivery records and invoices
must_have_features: manual entry option for delivery records

one_liner: For logistics managers in small e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of delivery records and invoices.
